# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

- About Us
- Work
- Team
- Contact Us

Today more than ever, Administration needs a new way of thinking---an innovative approach towards what it does and about the quality of its ideas especially in the institutes of eminence. This new way of thinking is about engaging staff in structured activities and observable behaviours to facilitate knowledge transmission in keeping with the latest developments in pedagogy in line with Institute’s Vision.

Our motive in Establishment II is to endeavour in creating a transformational experience that promotes institutes’ overall success, well-being, and resiliency at all levels in all domains of Administrative Affairs.

Establishment II Section is headed by Assistant Registrar (Establishment II). The section is concerned with the process of responsive people-centric modern administration that is an integral part of Good Governance.

The Establishment II deals with all the appointments, promotions, maintenance of Service Books, posting/transfer, pay-fixation, increments, grant of leaves/LTC, grant of various advances, children education allowance, retirements/ resignations, disciplinary proceedings, issuance of instructions and compilation of reports, etc. We strive to establish a strong, high on Integrity & transparent organizational foundation to recruit, hire, and retain a diverse and inclusive team of professionals.

# Page Title: Innovative Administration & Knowledge Engagement | IIT Jammu

### About Us

Today more than ever, Administration needs a new way of thinking---an innovative approach towards what it does and about the quality of its ideas especially in the institutes of eminence. This new way of thinking is about engaging staff in structured activities and observable behaviours to facilitate knowledge transmission in keeping with the latest developments in pedagogy in line with Institute’s Vision.

### Message

I know that the past few years have been challenging for us all, with the ongoing pandemic affecting both our personal and professional lives. However, I have been continuously impressed by the resilience and adaptability shown by our team. As the Assistant Registrar, I am here to assist you with any administrative issues related to Establishment II. As we move forward, I am confident that we will continue to face any challenges that come our way with determination and teamwork.

##### Puja Rajyaguru
Assistant Registrar | Establishment II

# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

- About Us
- Work
- Team
- Contact Us

All matters relating to following subjects are dealt by the Establishment Section:-

**General Administrative Matters**

1. CCS(CCA) Rules 1965, CCS(Conduct) Rules 1964, CCS (Temporary Service) Rules 1965- interpretation and application.
2. Retirement/Voluntary Retirement / Pre-mature Retirement / Extension in Service
3. Verification of character & antecedents
4. Promotion, Seniority Departmental Examinations and Review of MACP Scheme cases
5. Processing of House Building Advance, Computer Advance, Children Education Allowance, etc
6. Maintenance of in-position strength and sanctioned strength
7. Recruitment process for all Regular/Contractual/Third party employees including managing HR requisition, drafting and publishing advertisement, query handling, applications forms, preparation and issuance of Offer of appointments, issuing joining order and orientation training of new joinees etc.
8. Pay Fixation, interpretation of FR on pay matters, special allowance, deputation allowance etc.
9. General issues & interpretation of leave rules including special kinds of leave. Maintenance of leave account of Group A, B and C cadre employees
10. Grant of NOC and Forwarding of applications in response to advertisements, relieving of permanent employee on lien
11. Maintenance of Service Books, Personal Files and Annual Property Returns
12. Joining Time/Joining Pay benefits etc.
13. Holidays for IIT Jammu employees
14. Scrutiny, passing and preparation of Group A, B and C - T.A., L.T.C.  and other staff related claims
15. Maintenance of Annual Performance Appraisal reports
16. Providing assistance in preparation of promotion panels & Departmental examinations
17. Confidential matters relation to promotions, confirmations, probation in the cadre of Group 'B', and 'C'
18. Disciplinary cases, RTI matters and Litigation matters pertaining to Establishment.
19. Parliament questions/ data / report preparation etc. relating to Establishment Section.

**Training and Development Matters:**

In addition to above, Establishment II also deal with the matters under Career Progression & Training like Preparation of training plan of groups A, B and C staff
